name: Crockpot Steak and Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into serving-sized pieces.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Dredge in flour.
4. Heat oil in a skillet.
5. Brown the steak pieces.
6. Place the browned pieces into the crockpot.
7. Mix the soup mix and water, then pour over the steak in the crockpot.
8. Add green pepper.
9. Cook on high for 2 hours or until the steak is tender. The meat will make its own gravy; no thickening is necessary.
